pass_if_all_true: Officio ACK or missing-authority WARN exists before implementation.
Taskpack is not treated as role authority.
All writes remain inside allowed IMPERIUM_NEW_GENERATION paths.
Existing slice is enhanced rather than discarded.
The panel is visibly closer to the primary target reference.
Textures/materials are visibly richer and more premium.
Neuro-motion is now visibly present and still restrained.
Commit is created if gates pass.
warn_conditions: Some button actions remain shallow because full UX hardening is deferred.
Some motion is intentionally limited for performance discipline.
Push fails due to credentials/network, but commit and evidence exist.
block_conditions: Taskpack is used as role authority.
Work spills outside allowed write scope.
The result drifts away from the reference.
Neuro-motion is still not visibly present.
Ambient motion implies fake backend work.
No screenshots or no reports exist.
